subcodes.first_line: O perfumer! Though musk of Tartary hath a sweet-scented fragrance, yet the essence of the love of God possesseth another perfume [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار مشک اذفر را هر چند رائحه معطر است ولی جوهر محبت الله را بوی خوش دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude
